summary: Iteration 95: Bug fix verification for Agent Terrain registration form and Plus tab testing - ALL TESTS PASSED
seed_data_creation: Created test registrations via /api/ussd/register-web during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: Agent Terrain registration form now correctly calls /api/ussd/register-web instead of non-existent /api/ussd/register-by-agent. All features working: registration form, Plus tabs for both agent and farmer dashboards, field agent dashboard, my-farmers endpoint.

bug_fix_verification.issue: Agent Terrain registration form was calling non-existent endpoint /api/ussd/register-by-agent causing 'Erreur reseau'

tests.result: PASSED - Returns 200 with farmer_id and code_planteur

tests.test: Registered farmer appears in Recentes list
Planteurs tab loads (0 farmers for test agent)
Plus tab renders with correct sections
Plus tab renders with correct sections

notes.farmer_selection_flow: Could not fully test farmer selection -> fiches flow because test agent has 0 farmers assigned. The Planteurs tab correctly shows empty state. The farmer profile view with 6 FARMER_FORMS is implemented in code but requires farmers to be assigned to the agent.
notes.offline_support: Offline support for registration is implemented in code (uses queueAction from OfflineContext). When offline, registrations are queued in IndexedDB and synced when back online. This was not tested as it requires simulating offline mode.
